name: NightHawk Biosciences Inc. Common Stock
summary: NightHawk Biosciences, Inc., formerly known as Heat Biologics, Inc., is a biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery, development, and commercialization of therapies for the treatment of cancer and infectious diseases. The company is developing a pipeline of product candidates based on its gp96 platform technology. NightHawk Biosciences is headquartered in Morrisville, North Carolina.
